KXPLLGAME-26JUL10UTANYA-NYA.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
KXPLLGAME-26JUL10UTANYA-NYA.rules_primary: If New York Atlas wins the Utah Archers vs New York Atlas Premier Lacrosse League game originally scheduled for Jul 10, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
KXPLLGAME-26JUL10UTANYA-NYA.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the team who wins the Utah Archers vs New York Atlas Premier Lacrosse League game originally scheduled for Jul 10, 2026. If this game is postponed/delayed and played within 14 days of the originally scheduled start time, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished. If a postponed/cancelled game is not played or is rescheduled further than 14 days out, the market will resolve to a fair price for each team in accordance with the rules. If the game is declared a tie, the market will resolve to 50/50 for both teams.
KXPLLGAME-26JUL10UTANYA-NYA.title: Utah Archers vs New York Atlas Winner?
